title: sempervivum altum
intro: Sempervivum altum, also known as the mountain evergreen or giant houseleek, is a succulent plant species native to the mountainous regions of the Balkans. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Sempervivum altum include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce fever, and provide relief from anxiety and stress. Sempervivum altum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
